title: pristimera graciliflora subsp. newalensis
intro: Pristimera graciliflora subsp. newalensis, also known as Newalensis Pristimera, is a plant species in the family Celastraceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves and stems, which are used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Pristimera graciliflora subsp. newalensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, among others. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of this plant involves boiling its leaves and stems in water to make a tea or infusion for medicinal purposes.
